steps.title: Identify the key action in the examples
steps.content: Both examples show artists “incorporated” and “combined” Indigenous music with other styles — the signal is a merging or blending action.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content: Fuse works — it means to blend or merge things together. The other three choices don't express combining: exaggerate overstates, analyze examines, and acquire obtains. That matches choice A — A is correct.
